changes.reason: Add the TryThis launch badge and keep the repository name stable.
Store a stable lookup manifest for the last good launch.
Store the validated launch configuration and provider policy.
Record machine-readable adoption lineage and launch evidence.
Record reviewable generated changes for future replay or upstream PRs.
Provide a human-readable adoption change history in the repository.

summary: TryThis prepared a launchable adoption package from the last verified workspace.

upstream_pull_request.body_template:
## Summary
This repository was analyzed, healed, launched, and validated by TryThis.

## Validation
- Analysis complete
- Launch successful
- Health endpoint reachable
- Runtime evidence recorded

## Provenance
- Repository: rkendel1/pacman-react
- Branch: trythis/heal
- Generated by TryThis after successful execution.

commit_plan.reason: Apply the verified runtime/start/build changes discovered during launch.
Preserve the validated launch URL, badge, and setup evidence for maintainers.

upstream_pull_request.message: Connect the TryThis GitHub App on the source repository to let TryThis sync a trythis/heal branch and publish launch checks back to GitHub.
upstream_pull_request.title: TryThis: Repository sync
